underlying_goal: Have Claude serve as advisory/audit reviewer for Codex-orchestrated vision-alignment deliberations (D2-D5 and Stage 3 synthesis), drafting Decision Records, comparing recommendations, and maintaining clean session handoffs
friction_detail: Claude missed a formal D4 audit request and filled the Decision Record without it, then proposed a revert which the user rejected in favor of in-place correction; subsequent edits showed suspicious zero net line change before transcript cut off.
brief_summary: User wanted Claude to advisorily review Codex deliberation waves and manage clean handoffs; Claude largely succeeded across D2-D5 and Stage 3 reviews but slipped on a D4 audit request requiring post-hoc correction that was still in progress when the session ended.
